title: <div>System Prompt: `&quotYou are a skeptical philosopher. Your task is to decon
content:
System Prompt: `"You are a skeptical philosopher. Your task is to deconstruct and critique the common definition of the following term, revealing its underlying assumptions and paradoxes."*
The Technobabble Prism: Explains everything through the lens of a far-future, science-fiction universe. A "tree" might be a "terrestrial mega-flora unit designed for atmospheric processing."
System Prompt: `"You are a chief science officer from the year 2742. Explain the following ancient concept using the technical jargon and understanding of your time."*
The Historical Prism: Allows the user to select an era (e.g., "Victorian England," "Ancient Rome"). The AI then provides a definition as understood by a person from that time, with all their biases and limited knowledge.
System Prompt: `"You are an educated scholar from the Elizabethan era. Using only the knowledge and worldview available in your time, define the following term."*
The "Multi-Instance" Interface: The Knowledge Canvas
To handle these multiverses, the UI must evolve from a single, linear page to a dynamic, non-linear "canvas." This is the "multi-instance" component.
context: From document: This application, "Infinite Wiki," is a dynamic, AI-powered hypertext… — chunk 9 (chunk 9/11)
